LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SUSAN SHIN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO LOS ANGELES IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY WHERE DEFENDANTS RESIDE AND WHERE THE CONTRACT WAS FORMED AND WAS TO BE PERFORMED, NO FEES AWARDED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL A. LOTTA, TEL. NO. (562) 438-9137 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SUSAN SEUNGHAN SHIN BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SUSAN SHIN'S MOTION For Change Of Venue TO LOS ANGELES IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY WHERE DEFENDANT'S RESIDE AND WHERE THE CONTRACT WAS FORMED AND WAS TO BE PERFORMED, NO FEES AWARDED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order.
